body: Good catch. I set the tour page to auto-hide anything before today, so old dates drop off on their own now. Pushed it.
nice, looks right now. thanks man
Assigning this one to you so it doesn't get lost. Just need to know: does it close if you tap outside the menu, or never? That tells me if it's the toggle or the link handler.
never. stays open till i reload. tapping outside doesnt do it either.
photo is in the drive. its a big file, sorry, brody shoots raw or whatever.
No worries, I compressed it and swapped it in. Live now, refresh the home page.
restart button worked, just took like 30 seconds. figured id note it happened again.
Yeah that's the free tier spinning the container down when nobody's hit the site in a while. I'll add a little keep-alive ping. Thanks for restarting it, that was the right move.
just spotted it reading through, buld -> build
Found it. The form was posting to the old endpoint I killed when I moved hosts. Repointed it and added a health check so we get an alert if it breaks again. Try it now.
just sent one, travis got it. good, we were probably missing booking emails for weeks lol
Added the spotify icon but pointed it at a temporary link for now since the tracks aren't live. I'll flip the URL the second wes sends it.
Kept the script font just for the big hero header and set everything else to the plain sans. Reads way better on mobile now.
yeah thats better. can actually read it now
Good call. Pulled the practice schedule and the garage address off the public about page. It's in a private note now if you all need to reference it.
Wes sent the bandcamp link so I'll bundle this with the spotify one and do both icons in the footer in one pass this weekend.
Ha, good catch. Fixed, four piece it is.
Yeah search was case sensitive, dumb default on my end. Lowercased both sides so it matches now. Thanks for poking at it.
confirmed fixed, deleted a few and it stays put now. nice
On it. I set the tour entry for oct 17, free, 8pm. Once you confirm the address on trophy I'll link the map.
